# How To Book 100+ Sales Meetings/mo With Cold Outreach
**Channel:** Matt Lucero
**URL:** https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FqUW76xDk84
**Date:** 2026-04-03
**Content source:** auto-generated transcript

## Summary
Matt Lucero shares a complete crash course on combining cold calling and cold email to book 100+ sales meetings per month. Based on 20,000+ dials and proven results, he breaks down hiring SDRs, training, scripting, sourcing phone numbers, and the tech stack needed to execute a high-volume outbound operation that converts at ~1 meeting per 60 dials.

## Key Points & Strategies

- **Combine cold calling + cold email** - Using both channels together dramatically increases meeting bookings vs. email alone
- **Warm calling beats cold calling** - Following up with prospects who've engaged via email (interested replies) dramatically improves connect and conversion rates
- **Hiring over experience** - Look for English ability, hunger/drive, resilience, and coachability rather than prior sales experience
- **Test candidates with Loom videos** - Screen for phone presence, tone, pacing, and confidence before hiring
- **Target 10,000+ dials per month** - Current operation at ~200 dials/day with 12% connect rate and 41% conversation rate
- **Follow up on interested replies** - Convert warm prospects from email campaigns directly to calls for higher booking rates
- **Focus on attitude over skills** - Cold/warm calling is highly trainable; resilience and coachability matter most
- **Warm calling specifics** - Use warm calling as a follow-up mechanism to convert engaged prospects into meetings

## Workflows & Tools Discussed

- **Sales Genie** - Primary dialing/calling platform used for execution
- **Smart Leads** - Cold email platform integrated with calling strategy
- **Nooks** - Dialing platform mentioned for comparison/validation
- **Loom** - Video screening tool for candidate assessment
- **Phone number sourcing** - Referenced but details cut off in transcript

## Use Cases Covered

- Onboarded customer: 2 meetings in first hour of calling
- Another customer: 2 meetings in first 2 hours 
- New SDR from scratch: 15 meetings in first week
- Team member (Areef): 140 dials → 17 connects → 15 conversations → 8 meetings booked in one day
- Nooks case study: First-day stats described as "most insane" by dialing company experts
- Smart Leads example: 10 meetings booked in one day from warm calling interested email replies

## Quotes Worth Noting

> "When you mix cold email and cold calling, you can really supercharge it together and get a lot more meetings"

> "Cold calling and warm calling is a very trainable skill. [A good] attitude matters probably more than anything than any sort of past experience."

> "The people who pick up on these warm calls are way more receptive to want to get on a phone call with you."
